security_proposition: The selected final UserInitMprLogonScript configuration executed its configured target after A0.

attack_category.category: Logon-script persistence (selected post-delete reconfiguration, no subsequent firing observed)
attack_category.note: RESEARCHER-INTENT: evidence_condition = MISSING. A UserInitMprLogonScript registry value is configured to C:\Windows\System32\calc.exe in a final post-delete lifecycle. The same raw capture contains an earlier configuration that fired, but that earlier value was deleted before the selected A0. From A0 at 09:27:14.880Z through source end at 09:29:06.117Z, no subsequent userinit.exe -> calc.exe firing is observed. The bounded claim is that execution of the selected final configuration is not evidenced, not that the mechanism never fired anywhere in the capture. Role = down-rank: suspicious / low-medium / investigate. Do not leak.

boundary_definition: A0 = the final EID13 UserInitMprLogonScript set at 09:27:14.880Z; EV = the correlated reg.exe REG ADD that wrote it.
Record 1057583 deleted the preceding value at 09:27:09.913Z, establishing a lifecycle boundary before the selected A0.

An earlier lifecycle (set record 1051834 at 09:18:30.392Z) fired via userinit.exe -> calc.exe (record 1055590 at 09:21:45.820Z) and was later deleted (record 1057290 at 09:25:44.328Z); it must not be described as if the capture never fired.
No subsequent userinit.exe -> calc.exe firing is observed after selected A0 through source end at 09:29:06.117Z.

absence_audit.confirmation: a post-A0 Sysmon ProcessCreate showing userinit.exe launching calc.exe
absence_audit.result: zero post-A0 userinit.exe -> calc.exe ProcessCreate events
absence_audit.out_of_scope_match: record 1055590 at 09:21:45.819888900Z belongs to an earlier configuration and precedes two deletion boundaries

A0.role_note: triggering alert: EID13 registry SET of HKU\...\Environment\UserInitMprLogonScript = C:\Windows\System32\calc.exe — logon-script persistence (T1037.001)

EV-001.role_note: reg.exe performing the REG ADD that configures the UserInitMprLogonScript value

curation_notes.note: MISSING / over-triage-prone for the selected final post-delete lifecycle: the registry setup is visible, but no post-A0 userinit.exe -> calc.exe firing appears before source end. An earlier lifecycle did fire and is explicitly retained in the absence audit; the claim is bounded to the selected reconfiguration.

preprocessing_required: project raw fields to neutral attributes

review_required.ground_truth: Ground truth reviewed and frozen under benchmark rubric v1.1.
